params_used.custom_text: // This module processes a 4-bit input and a 2-bit control signal to produce a 2-bit output. The output is determined by the following operations: right shift the input by 2 bits when the control signal is 00, perform a bitwise OR with the value 3 (binary 11) when the control signal is 01, invert the input bits when the control signal is 10, and perform a bitwise AND with the value 3 when the control signal is 11.
